data.title: Shiranuhi
data.synopsis:
The short is set in a coastal town in Kumamoto at the tail end of summer 1996. The 10-year-old boy Minato lives a precarious life with his drunkard father. Minato's only source of strength is Ben-chan, a goddess in the form of a young girl that appeared in Benten Island. The time he spends with her are the only times where he feels like himself. But when he is about to be separated from Ben-chan due to being sent to a children's home, Minato prays to a Shiranuhi, a mysterious light floating above the sea, to grant him one wish. His wish, filled with hatred towards his father, eventually becomes a curse.

(Source: Anime News Network)
data.background: The film marks the commercial anime debut of director Ryou Katanosaka, a graduate of Seian University of Art and Design who previously directed the 2015 live-action film Tabinoyamabiko while working independently as a freelance filmmaker.

titles.title: I Am Not the God of Drama

data.title: Wo Bushi Xi Shen
title_synonyms: I Am Not the God of Drama
data.synopsis:
Human civilization will never be extinguished! In a world where calamity descends, the young Chen Ling uses drama to prove the way and defy fate to become a god in a bizarre world where "books, doctors, soldiers, zither, chess, puppets, witches, divination, theft, and prostitution" are intertwined!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of San Jiu Yinyu's (三九音域) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Yi Shou Mi Cheng
data.synopsis:
The world is an illusion, but love is real. At eighteen, Gao Yang accidentally discovers the cruel truth of the world: his family and friends are all terrifying "beasts," and these "beasts" will kill anyone who discovers the truth. Facing the "beasts'" frenzied attacks, Gao Yang, on the verge of death, activates a mysterious system and awakens his talent Luck, thus beginning a game of survival between lamb and wolf…

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Peng Pai's (彭湃) web novel of the same title.

data.title: You & Aizu
data.synopsis: Music video for the song You & Aizu by Kanade Otonose.

data.title: Li Xiongmao
data.synopsis:
The story follows Li Xiongmao, a human boy raised by the demon race, who is ordered by his master to leave Black and White Mountain to kill three enemies who destroyed the demon race. In the process of investigating the truth, he gradually uncovers the conflict between humans and demons, the secrets of the dynasty, and the mystery of his own destiny.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

《崩坏：星穹铁道》动画短片：「这游戏还能不能玩了？」
Honkai: Star Rail - Is This Game Even Playable?

data.title: Benghuai: Xing Qiong Tiedao - Zhe Youxi Hai Neng Buneng Wanle?
data.title_english: Honkai: Star Rail - Is This Game Even Playable?
data.title_japanese: 《崩坏：星穹铁道》动画短片：「这游戏还能不能玩了？」
data.synopsis:
"So, you let that Stellaron Hunter brat hack into your home base, and even your virtual avatar got beaten into a pile of spare parts?"

"Yes, Madam Herta."

"You couldn't beat her, so you kicked her offline? Pfft... Hahahahahahaha!"

"Correction: It is not about winning or losing. In that children's game, another matter is more worthy of our attention."

"Oh, you mean that Cartridge. The power of the Elation... It's more than just that."

"More."

(Source: YouTube)

data.title: Zhu Shen Yu Xi
data.synopsis:
Sixteen gods descended to the human world, tearing the world into countless fragments, transforming them into a life-or-death chessboard called the "Game of Faith." Humans became players, forced to enter bizarre instances every seven days, struggling to survive within the rules set by the gods. 

Cheng Shi, trapped on a rooftop in a desperate situation at the start, first believed in fate, then succumbed to deception, becoming a clown priest whose every word was a lie. The price was being plagued by misfortune, but his ability was to turn fiction into reality with lies. He used his silver tongue to deceive his teammates and manipulate the gods, running a tightrope between "faith" and "betrayal," rising from a pawn to become the one wielding the pieces. 

Opposing destinies, sixteen faiths, and six professions combine to create endless gameplay; the instances have diverse themes, the rules are fraught with danger, and the battles of wits and reversals are nested layer upon layer. This is the ultimate game of free will versus destiny—when the pawns begin to awaken, the gods must step down.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Yiyue Jiushi Qiu's (一月九十秋) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Bie Jiao Wo Emo
data.synopsis:
This hero who can save the world seems like a demon! Subversive, absurd, and sharp! Witness the ultimate "working class" hero's heroic comeback to protect the lights of every home!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Yi Qingfeng's (弈青锋) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Tianxia Wushuang: Fubing Cheng Pian
data.synopsis:
The King returns, unrivaled in the world! It is a story about falling to the bottom and returning to the top.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Shiluo Ye's (失落叶) web novel, Wangyou Zhi Tianxia Wushuang (网游之天下无双).

data.title: Yi Jian Du Zun
data.synopsis:
Life and death are nothing to me; if you're not convinced, then fight! All gods, Buddhas, and immortals are but a sword's edge. The young Ye Xuan, through a series of fortuitous events, unlocks the Prison Tower, a supreme treasure of the heavens, changing his destiny and embarking on the path of sword cultivation!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Qingluan Feng Shang's (青鸾峰上) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Changsheng Xianyou
data.synopsis:
This is a story about time, life, and humanity. The protagonist, Lin Changsheng, is cursed with the mayfly curse, living only one day every three years, born in the morning and dying at dusk, his life as fleeting as a mayfly. After unexpectedly learning that the curse can be broken, Lin Changsheng and his companion, Tong Zhihuan, embark on a journey to find a way to break it. Along the way, they meet new friends, awaken their magical powers, fight demons, find family and love, unravel the mystery of their origins, and experience the joys and sorrows of human life.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Sigeng Bu Shui's (四更不睡) web novel of the same title.

titles.title: The Case Records of the Biblia Secondhand Bookstore
ビブリア古書堂の事件手帖
The Case Files of Biblia Bookstore

data.title: Biblia Koshodou no Jiken Techou
data.title_english: The Case Files of Biblia Bookstore
data.title_japanese: ビブリア古書堂の事件手帖
title_synonyms: The Case Records of the Biblia Secondhand Bookstore
data.synopsis:
Hidden away in a corner of Kamakura is an unassuming secondhand bookstore, the Biblia Antiquarian Bookshop. Shinokawa Shioriko, the owner of the shop, is an overly shy young and beautiful woman who doesn't fit the image of a used bookstore and often has trouble interacting with customers.

While customer service isn't her strong point, she more than makes up for it in other ways. Using her exhaustive knowledge and unrivaled passion for literature, she unravels the secrets and mysteries of the antiquarian books that come into her shop.

This is a story of secrets and rare books.

(Source: Nanodesu Translation)

titles.title: Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
The Diary of a Middle-Aged Sage's Carefree Life in Another World
Arafoo Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
The Diary of a Sage Around 40 Living in Another World
アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記

data.title: Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
data.title_japanese: アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記
title_synonyms: The Diary of a Middle-Aged Sage's Carefree Life in Another World
Arafoo Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
The Diary of a Sage Around 40 Living in Another World
data.synopsis:
Forty-year-old Satoshi Osako is a farmer in the Japanese countryside—and a hardcore player of Swords & Sorceries, an online VRRPG. The day he finally manages to defeat the game's final boss, it curses him with its dying breath and kills him in real life! With a little help from a carefree goddess, Satoshi finds himself reincarnated into a mysterious new world as his in-game character, the incredibly powerful Great Sage known as Zelos Merlin. He accordingly decides to use his newfound powers to...continue living a quiet life on another farm! But first, he'll have to fight his way out of the vast, dangerous forest he woke up in—thanks a lot, goddess—and it won't be long before he's running into bandits, getting roped into teaching a young noble girl magic, and more. Will the almighty Great Sage be able to conquer the toughest quest of all: getting some peace and quiet?

(Source: J-Novel Club)

data.title: Be My Star
data.synopsis:
Commander—

Do you think we've truly become the "stars of the Ark"?
I hope you'll see the answer with your own eyes—

This music video is something we're really proud of!
We put a lot of care into the editing, so we definitely want you to watch it!

Listen to it a lot and keep it on repeat!
And don’t forget to give us lots of likes, shares, and comments too.

(Source: YouTube, translated)
